summary: Full end-to-end testing of Crew Transportation Type feature. All backend APIs pass (13/13). All frontend flows verified: admin toggle, crew profile edit/save/display, contractor crew cards with transport badge, validation error toast.

issues: Console warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option> in TradeSelect component (hydration warning, pre-existing, not transport feature related)

action_items: Minor: Fix TradeSelect component - <span> inside <option> causes hydration warning (pre-existing, not part of this feature)
critical_code_review_comments: TradeSelect component renders <span> inside <option> tags which is invalid HTML - causes React hydration warning in console
seed_data_creation: crew1 transportation_type set to 'Car' during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Transportation Type feature fully verified. Backend: GET /api/admin/settings has enable_crew_transportation_type, PUT toggles it, GET /api/settings/public returns it, GET /api/users/me returns transportation_type, PUT /api/users/profile persists it, all 5 crew users have the field. Frontend: Admin Settings 'Crew Transportation Type' toggle in Crew Features section works. Crew profile shows Transportation Type dropdown in edit mode (data-testid=profile-transportation-type-select), shows transport label in display mode. Validation toast 'Please select your transportation type' shown when saving without selecting. Contractor crew cards show transport badge (data-testid=crew-transport-{id}) for crew with type set. Note: GET /api/users/profile (405) - correct endpoint is GET /api/users/me.
verified_flows: GET /api/users/me returns transportation_type field for crew
All 5 crew users have transportation_type field (migration verified)
Crew profile edit mode shows Transportation Type dropdown (data-testid present)
Selecting 'Car' and saving updates profile with success toast 'Profile updated!'
Transport displayed in profile display mode under 'Transport' label
Validation error toast 'Please select your transportation type' shown when saving empty
Contractor dashboard shows transport badge (data-testid=crew-transport-{id}) on crew card with type set
